name: Kernel Unit Tests
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  run-submodule:
    name: FreeRTOS/Source Submodule Revision
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v3
      with:
        submodules: 'recursive'
        fetch-depth: 5

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3.8 \
    git \
    lcov \
    cflow \
    ruby \
    doxygen \
    build-essential \
    unifdef \
    curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Clone FreeRTOS repository with recursive submodules
RUN git clone --recursive --depth 5 https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS.git .

# Checkout the main branch from FreeRTOS-Kernel repository into FreeRTOS/Source
RUN git clone --depth 5 https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel.git FreeRTOS/Source && \
    cd FreeRTOS/Source && \
    git checkout main && \
    cd /app

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

content.thinking:
Ah, I see the issue! When we clone the FreeRTOS repository with recursive submodules, it already includes FreeRTOS/Source as a submodule pointing to a specific commit. So when I try to clone FreeRTOS-Kernel into FreeRTOS/Source, it fails because that directory already exists.

Instead, I should:
1. Clone FreeRTOS with recursive submodules
2. Then remove the FreeRTOS/Source directory
3. Then clone FreeRTOS-Kernel into FreeRTOS/Source

Or I can:
1. Clone FreeRTOS with recursive submodules, but without including the FreeRTOS/Source submodule
2. Then clone FreeRTOS-Kernel into FreeRTOS/Source

Or the simpler approach:
1. Clone FreeRTOS with recursive submodules
2. Remove the FreeRTOS/Source directory (or move it)
3. Clone FreeRTOS-Kernel into FreeRTOS/Source

Let me update the Dockerfile to handle this.

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3 \
    git \
    lcov \
    cflow \
    ruby \
    doxygen \
    build-essential \
    unifdef \
    curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Clone FreeRTOS repository with recursive submodules
RUN git clone --recursive --depth 5 https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS.git .

# Checkout the main branch from FreeRTOS-Kernel repository into FreeRTOS/Source
RUN git clone --depth 5 https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel.git FreeRTOS/Source && \
    cd FreeRTOS/Source && \
    git checkout main && \
    cd /app

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
